name: Lentil Soup with Franankfurters
recipeIngredient: 1 Leek or green onion, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the leek or green onion.
2. Wash the lentils thoroughly.
3. In a 2-1/2 quart saucepan, bring 6 cups of water to a boil.
4. Add the lentils, bacon, leek or green onion, carrot, and celery to the boiling water. Simmer, partially covered, for 30 to 40 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a frypan, saute chopped onion in vegetable oil until soft.
6. Sprinkle flour over the onions and stir.
7. Lower the heat and stir constantly, cooking until the flour turns a light brown. Do not burn the flour.
8. Stir in 1/2 cup of hot lentil soup into the browned flour; beat well with a wire whisk.
9. Add vinegar and continue beating.
10. Pour the contents of the frypan into the lentil pan and stir together.
11. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes or until the lentils are soft.
12. Add the frankfurters and catsup. Cook to heat through the frankfurters.
13. Season with salt and pepper, then serve hot.
